description: Legal document. In Judaeo-Arabic. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Location: Fustat. Refers to the ending of a man's period of mourning; 'the middle one, R. Peraḥya'; a number of dinars and a rubāʿī; 3 dinars and a rubāʿī; a period of time involving Elul; an additional payment on top of rent; and Abū l-Surūr.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
